hero.subhead: Upload a selfie, pick a scenario, and our AI does the rest. In ~90 seconds you'll have a video realistic enough to make your friends double-take.
hero.mockupCaption: Real demo: Unsplash photo + fal.ai · ~90 seconds

1.title: Upload a photo
1.desc: A selfie or any photo works best

2.title: Describe the prank
2.desc: Tell the AI what to make happen in the video

3.title: Get your video
3.desc: Share the prank video with your friends

caseStudies.title: 5 real pranks made with Pranko
caseStudies.subtitle: Each card is a real Unsplash photo pushed through fal.ai. Click to play the AI result.

cs1.title: Got arrested! 🚔
cs1.desc: Unsplash: business person in a hallway. fal.ai: getting arrested in the street.
cs1.story: Send to your boss 10 minutes before the big meeting. 'Sorry, can't make it in today.'

cs2.title: CEO to homeless
cs2.desc: Unsplash: a well-dressed businessman. fal.ai: same man, down on his luck.
cs2.story: Show up to your ex's wedding as the 'guest speaker'. Watch the room lose it.

cs3.title: Grandma breakdancing
cs3.desc: Unsplash: a fragile 80-year-old grandma. fal.ai: her dancing to a funky beat.
cs3.story: Send it on the family WhatsApp group at 7am. Mom will screenshot it before breakfast.

cs4.title: House party aftermath
cs4.desc: Unsplash: a clean, tidy living room. fal.ai: same room, post-party chaos.
cs4.story: Send to your roommate: 'We need to talk when you get home.'

cs5.title: Singing in the rain 🌧️
cs5.desc: Unsplash: a smiling person outdoors. fal.ai: dancing in the rain like a musical.
cs5.story: Send to your crush the night before your date. 'Can't wait for tomorrow.'

cta.title: Ready to cause chaos?

create.promptLabel: What should happen in the video?
create.promptPlaceholder: e.g. make me win the lottery on live TV, make me dance like nobody's watching at a wedding, make me get chased by a giant penguin
